instructions: Generate these images inside Codex using the image generation tool.
Do not put text, logos, license plates or watermarks inside generated images.
Copy each generated image into the listed file path, converting to WebP when needed.
The website is not ready to publish until every required image exists.

hero-mobile.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: mobile landing page hero image for a Brazilian auto repair shop
Primary request: create a premium vertical advertising photograph for a local auto repair shop in Curitiba, Brazil
Scene/backdrop: clean, organized mechanical workshop with tires, tool cabinets, car lift, diagnostic equipment and realistic workshop details
Subject: fictional professional mechanic or service advisor, confident and trustworthy, looking at the camera
Style/medium: photorealistic editorial advertising photography
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 mobile-first hero crop, subject clear in the center-right, background cinematic, usable dark negative space for website headline overlay
Lighting/mood: soft natural window light mixed with subtle workshop lighting, modern, competent and trustworthy
Color palette: use the prospect brand palette subtly in wardrobe accents and workshop details: primary #0F4C81, secondary #D7261E, accent #F4C430
Text: no text
Constraints: realistic Brazilian workshop, no logo, no brand names, no license plates, no watermark, no fake business signage
Avoid: fake-looking hands, distorted tools, unreadable labels, extra fingers, luxury showroom, generic stock-photo smile

hero-desktop.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: desktop landing page hero image for a Brazilian auto repair shop
Primary request: premium photorealistic advertising photo of a modern Brazilian auto repair workshop in Curitiba
Scene/backdrop: a car lifted for inspection, organized tools, tires, diagnostic scanner, clean but realistic working environment
Style/medium: cinematic commercial automotive photography
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 hero crop, strong subject on the right, generous dark negative space on the left for headline and CTA
Lighting/mood: cinematic natural light from large windows, shallow depth of field, high trust, technical competence
Color palette: subtle brand accents: primary #0F4C81, secondary #D7261E, accent #F4C430
Text: no text
Constraints: no logos, no readable text, no license plates, no watermark, no fake business signage
Avoid: luxury showroom, distorted car details, fake tools, generic stock-photo look

og-image.prompt: Create a premium square advertising image for a local Brazilian auto repair shop website preview. Show a clean mechanical workshop with a car being inspected, tires and tools in the background, warm professional lighting, high trust, modern service quality. Composition must work as a WhatsApp link preview thumbnail. Use subtle brand accents: #0F4C81, #D7261E, #F4C430. No text, no logos, no watermark, no license plates.
